meta.title: About | Fernanda Haese
meta.description: Learn more about Fernanda Haese, her skills, tools, experience and education.

title: About Me
description: I'm a Digital Designer with experience in UI/UX Design and Front-end Development. I bring design and technology together to transform real needs into functional, clear and visually consistent digital solutions. I enjoy being involved throughout the creative process, from research, ideation and defining the visual direction to implementing and delivering the final interface, product or communication piece.

frontendDev.description: Development of the Brotaí digital platform, a project of the Niterói City Government, working from requirements gathering to solution implementation, including data modeling, creation of interfaces focused on UX/UI, front-end development (React, TypeScript, HTML and CSS) and back-end development (Node.js, Prisma ORM and SQLite), as well as testing, validation and continuous product improvement.

digitalDesigner.description: Development of digital design projects for different segments, including websites, interfaces, visual identities and communication materials, working from requirements gathering to final delivery, focusing on UX/UI, information organization, visual design, project management and client relations.

fiap.institution: Paulista Faculty of Informatics and Administration (FIAP)
